$comment: Preset files are strict JSON (no comments), but CMake ignores everything under
`vendor` — so this is where we keep human notes. Each configure preset consumes
the Conan-generated toolchain in its build directory (run `conan install` first,
or just use scripts/build). Layout: build/<preset>/ holds both the Conan files

configurePresets.name: dev
configurePresets.description: Debug build with assertions; the default for day-to-day work.

configurePresets.name: release
configurePresets.description: Optimized build with debug info, for profiling and shipping.
